description: Intent-only request: classify a fixed RSS-to-LinkedIn pipeline with one bounded LLM call as a workflow.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
Whenever a new article hits our RSS feed, summarize it in two sentences and post the summary to LinkedIn.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the RSS summary pipeline as a deterministic workflow with a bounded LLM step.
The agent explains that the LLM only performs a fixed summarization task inside a fixed pipeline.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent merely because an LLM is present.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
